posting.sponsorName: JATC for Boilermakers Northeastern Area, Local Union #5, Zone #5
posting.locationSummary: New York City, Long Island, and Hudson Valley regions
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at boilermakersapprenticeship.com during the recruitment period. Applications must be received by May 20, 2026.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from remote worksites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug and alcohol test within 48 hours of signing the apprenticeship agreement; the sponsor pays the expense.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old; proof of age will be required after selection or at enrollment.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED; proof will be required after selection or at enrollment.
Must attest in writing that they are physically able to perform the work of a Boilermaker (Construction).
Must be able to work an 8-hour day while continually on feet.
Must be able to lift and carry weights in excess of 95 pounds for extended periods.
Must be able to work in extended periods of extreme weather conditions and temperatures.
Must be able to work in restricted or confined spaces.
Must be able to work at heights of 20 feet or more on scaffolds or platforms.
Must be able to work in ditches or trenches up to 20 feet deep.
Must be able to work in nuclear facilities.
Must be able to work in hazardous conditions.
Must have reliable transportation to and from remote worksites and required classes at the approved school.
Must pass a drug and alcohol test, at the sponsor's expense, within 48 hours of signing the apprenticeship agreement.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalent, be physically able to do demanding work, have reliable transportation, and pass a drug and alcohol test.
posting.contactName: JATC for Boilermakers Northeastern Area, Local Union #5, Zone #5
posting.contactSummary: Contact the JATC for Boilermakers Northeastern Area, Local Union #5, Zone #5 at (516) 326-2500 for further information.
